violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -Sani Cloth is dunked in sani sink to wipe surfaces and then rinsed out and stored at sink edge. -Other wiping cloths are stored with spray bottle at wire rack near drain board.

Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitizer solution for three compartment sink was not maintained at the proper concentration. -Sani sink found at ~150ppm Quat. *Maintain at 200-400ppm pre label instructions.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. -Measuring spoon laying in Malt powder
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
